description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages ci_prepare and test and global variables CI_IMAGE, CI_IMAGE_LATEST, CI_IMAGE_VERSION, PROMETHEUS_VERSION. In the ci_prepare stage add a job named build ci image that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, runs only on branches matching the regex ^ci-image/.*, and executes the script commands in order: [[ -z $CI_REGISTRY ]] || docker login --username ${CI_REGISTRY_USER} --password ${CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD} ${CI_REGISTRY}; [[ -z $CI_REGISTRY ]] || docker pull ${CI_IMAGE_LATEST} || echo 'No latest image, will not use cache'; docker build --build-arg PROMETHEUS_VERSION=${PROMETHEUS_VERSION} --cache-from ${CI_IMAGE_LATEST} -t ${CI_IMAGE} -f dockerfiles/ci/Dockerfile .; docker tag ${CI_IMAGE} ${CI_IMAGE_LATEST}; [[ -z $CI_REGISTRY ]] || docker push ${CI_IMAGE}; [[ -z $CI_REGISTRY ]] || docker push ${CI_IMAGE_LATEST}; [[ -z $CI_REGISTRY ]] || docker logout ${CI_REGISTRY}. In the test stage add a job named rules check that uses the image built in the previous job ($CI_IMAGE) and runs the script: ls rules/*.rules.yml >/dev/null 2>&1 && promtool check rules rules/*.rules.yml || echo 'No files to check!'.
